sql1: SELECT * FROM EMP LEFT JOIN DEPT ON EMP.EMPNO = DEPT.DEPTNO WHERE DEPT.DEPTNO IS NOT NULL AND DEPT.NAME IS NOT NULL
sql2: SELECT EMP0.EMPNO, EMP0.ENAME, EMP0.JOB, EMP0.MGR, EMP0.HIREDATE, EMP0.SAL, EMP0.COMM, EMP0.DEPTNO, EMP0.SLACKER, CAST(DEPT0.DEPTNO AS INTEGER) AS DEPTNO0, CAST(DEPT0.NAME AS VARCHAR(10)) AS NAME FROM EMP AS EMP0 INNER JOIN DEPT AS DEPT0 ON EMP0.EMPNO = DEPT0.DEPTNO

sql1: SELECT COUNT(*), CASE WHEN EMP.SAL < 11 THEN -1 * EMP.SAL ELSE EMP.SAL END FROM EMP INNER JOIN BONUS ON EMP.ENAME = BONUS.ENAME GROUP BY CASE WHEN EMP.SAL < 11 THEN -1 * EMP.SAL ELSE EMP.SAL END
sql2: SELECT COUNT(*), t2.EXPR$1 FROM (SELECT ENAME, CASE WHEN SAL < 11 THEN -1 * SAL ELSE SAL END AS EXPR$1 FROM EMP) AS t2 INNER JOIN (SELECT ENAME FROM BONUS) AS t3 ON t2.ENAME = t3.ENAME GROUP BY t2.EXPR$1

sql1: SELECT SUM(DISTINCT DEPTNO), COUNT(DISTINCT DEPTNO), MIN(DEPTNO) FROM EMP
sql2: SELECT SUM(DEPTNO), COUNT(DEPTNO), MIN(DEPTNO) FROM (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO) AS t2

sql1: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(SAL), SUM(SAL) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO
sql2: SELECT DEPTNO, CAST(MIN($f2) FILTER (WHERE $f5) AS INTEGER) AS $f1, COALESCE(SUM($f3) FILTER (WHERE $f6), 0) AS $f2 FROM (SELECT DEPTNO, COALESCE(SUM(SAL), 0) AS $f2, MIN(SAL) AS $f3, GROUPING(DEPTNO, JOB) = 1 AS $f5, GROUPING(DEPTNO, JOB) = 0 AS $f6 FROM EMP GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((DEPTNO, JOB), DEPTNO)) AS t3 GROUP BY DEPTNO

sql1: SELECT COUNT(*), CASE WHEN EMP.SAL < 11 THEN 11 ELSE -1 * EMP.SAL END FROM BONUS LEFT JOIN EMP ON BONUS.ENAME = EMP.ENAME GROUP BY CASE WHEN EMP.SAL < 11 THEN 11 ELSE -1 * EMP.SAL END
sql2: SELECT COUNT(*), CASE WHEN t3.EXPR$0 THEN 11 ELSE t3.EXPR$1 END FROM (SELECT ENAME FROM BONUS) AS t2 LEFT JOIN (SELECT ENAME, SAL < 11 AS EXPR$0, -1 * SAL AS EXPR$1 FROM EMP) AS t3 ON t2.ENAME = t3.ENAME GROUP BY CASE WHEN t3.EXPR$0 THEN 11 ELSE t3.EXPR$1 END

sql1: SELECT DEPT.NAME FROM DEPT LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO FROM (SELECT SAL, DEPTNO FROM EMP) AS t WHERE SAL > 100 GROUP BY DEPTNO) AS t2 ON DEPT.DEPTNO = t2.DEPTNO
sql2: SELECT NAME FROM DEPT

sql1: SELECT EMP.DEPTNO, DEPT0.DEPTNO AS DEPTNO0 FROM EMP LEFT JOIN DEPT ON EMP.DEPTNO = DEPT.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN DEPT AS DEPT0 ON EMP.DEPTNO = DEPT0.DEPTNO
sql2: SELECT EMP0.DEPTNO, DEPT1.DEPTNO AS DEPTNO0 FROM EMP AS EMP0 LEFT JOIN DEPT AS DEPT1 ON EMP0.DEPTNO = DEPT1.DEPTNO

sql1: SELECT EMP.DEPTNO FROM EMP LEFT JOIN DEPT ON EMP.DEPTNO = DEPT.DEPTNO
sql2: SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP

sql1: SELECT EMP.DEPTNO FROM DEPT RIGHT JOIN EMP ON DEPT.DEPTNO = EMP.DEPTNO
sql2: SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP

sql1: SELECT EMPNO, (EMPNO, DEPTNO) IN (SELECT EMPNO, DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO < 20) AS D FROM EMP
sql2: SELECT EMP1.EMPNO, CASE WHEN t3.i IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS D FROM EMP AS EMP1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT EMPNO, DEPTNO, TRUE AS i FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO < 20) AS t3 ON EMP1.EMPNO = t3.EMPNO AND EMP1.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO

sql1: SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO IS NOT DISTINCT FROM 20
sql2: SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO = 20

sql1: SELECT SAL FROM EMP WHERE CASE WHEN SAL = 1000 THEN CASE WHEN SAL = 1000 THEN NULL ELSE 1 END IS NULL ELSE CASE WHEN SAL = 2000 THEN NULL ELSE 1 END IS NULL END IS TRUE
sql2: SELECT SAL FROM EMP WHERE SAL IN (1000, 2000)

sql1: SELECT 1 FROM EMP RIGHT JOIN EMP AS EMP0 ON EMP.DEPTNO = EMP0.DEPTNO WHERE EMP.DEPTNO > 7 AND EMP0.DEPTNO > 9
sql2: SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO > 9) AS t1 RIGHT JOIN (SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO > 9) AS t2 ON t1.DEPTNO = t2.DEPTNO WHERE t1.DEPTNO > 7

sql1: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(DISTINCT ENAME) AS CDE, COUNT(DISTINCT JOB, ENAME) AS CDJE, COUNT(DISTINCT DEPTNO, JOB) AS CDDJ, SUM(SAL) AS S FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO
sql2: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(ENAME) FILTER (WHERE $g_1) AS CDE, COUNT(JOB, ENAME) FILTER (WHERE $g_0) AS CDJE, COUNT(DEPTNO, JOB) FILTER (WHERE $g_2) AS CDDJ, CAST(MIN(S) FILTER (WHERE $g_3) AS INTEGER) AS S FROM (SELECT DEPTNO, ENAME, JOB, SUM(SAL) AS S, GROUPING(DEPTNO, ENAME, JOB) = 0 AS $g_0, GROUPING(DEPTNO, ENAME, JOB) = 1 AS $g_1, GROUPING(DEPTNO, ENAME, JOB) = 2 AS $g_2, GROUPING(DEPTNO, ENAME, JOB) = 3 AS $g_3 FROM EMP GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((ENAME, JOB, DEPTNO), (ENAME, DEPTNO), (JOB, DEPTNO), DEPTNO)) AS t2 GROUP BY DEPTNO

sql1: SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, SUM(U) FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO, SLACKER, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS U FROM EMP UNION ALL SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO, SLACKER, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS U FROM EMP) AS t1 GROUP BY ROLLUP(DEPTNO, JOB)
sql2: SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, SUM(EXPR$2) FROM (SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, SUM(CAST(NULL AS INTEGER)) AS EXPR$2 FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, JOB UNION ALL SELECT DEPTNO, JOB, SUM(CAST(NULL AS INTEGER)) AS EXPR$2 FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, JOB) AS t8 GROUP BY ROLLUP(DEPTNO, JOB)

sql1: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO < CASE WHEN DEPTNO IN (SELECT CASE WHEN TRUE THEN CAST(DEPTNO AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO < 20) = TRUE THEN 10 WHEN DEPTNO IN (SELECT CASE WHEN TRUE THEN CAST(DEPTNO AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO < 20) = FALSE THEN 20 ELSE 30 END
sql2: SELECT EMP2.EMPNO FROM EMP AS EMP2 CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUE THEN CAST(DEPTNO AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END) AS ck FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO < 20) AS t7 LEFT JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN TRUE THEN CAST(t8.DEPTNO AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END AS $f0, t9.i FROM (SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO < 20) AS t8, (VALUES (TRUE)) AS t9 (i) GROUP BY CASE WHEN TRUE THEN CAST(t8.DEPTNO AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END, t9.i) AS t11 ON EMP2.DEPTNO = t11.$f0 WHERE EMP2.EMPNO < CASE WHEN CASE WHEN t7.c = 0 THEN FALSE WHEN t11.i IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE WHEN t7.ck < t7.c THEN NULL ELSE FALSE END = TRUE THEN 10 WHEN CASE WHEN t7.c = 0 THEN FALSE WHEN t11.i IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE WHEN t7.ck < t7.c THEN NULL ELSE FALSE END = FALSE THEN 20 ELSE 30 END

sql1: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE FALSE) AS t0 FULL JOIN DEPT ON t0.DEPTNO = DEPT.DEPTNO
sql2: SELECT CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS EMPNO, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(20)) AS ENAME, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(10)) AS JOB, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS MGR, CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS HIREDATE, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS SAL, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS COMM, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS DEPTNO, CAST(NULL AS BOOLEAN) AS SLACKER, CAST(DEPTNO AS INTEGER) AS DEPTNO0, CAST(NAME AS VARCHAR(10)) AS NAME FROM DEPT

sql1: SELECT * FROM (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT UNION ALL SELECT NAME FROM DEPT) AS t1 ORDER BY NAME
sql2: SELECT * FROM ((SELECT NAME FROM DEPT ORDER BY NAME) UNION ALL (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT ORDER BY NAME)) AS t ORDER BY NAME

sql1: SELECT * FROM (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT UNION ALL SELECT NAME FROM DEPT) AS t1 ORDER BY NAME FETCH NEXT 0 ROWS ONLY
sql2: SELECT * FROM ((SELECT NAME FROM DEPT ORDER BY NAME FETCH NEXT 0 ROWS ONLY) UNION ALL (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT ORDER BY NAME FETCH NEXT 0 ROWS ONLY)) AS t ORDER BY NAME FETCH NEXT 0 ROWS ONLY

sql1: SELECT 1 FROM EMP INNER JOIN EMP AS EMP0 ON EMP.DEPTNO = EMP0.DEPTNO WHERE EMP.DEPTNO > 7 AND EMP0.SAL = EMP0.DEPTNO AND EMP.COMM = EMP.DEPTNO AND EMP.COMM + EMP.DEPTNO > EMP.COMM / 2
sql2: SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO > 7 AND COMM = DEPTNO AND COMM + DEPTNO > COMM / 2) AS t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE SAL = DEPTNO) AS t2 WHERE DEPTNO > 7) AS t3 ON t1.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO

sql1: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE (((SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO < 20))) < (((SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO > 100))) OR SAL < 100
sql2: SELECT EMP2.EMPNO FROM EMP AS EMP2 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SINGLE_VALUE(DEPTNO) AS $f0 FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO < 20) AS t7 ON TRUE LEFT JOIN (SELECT SINGLE_VALUE(DEPTNO) AS $f0 FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO > 100) AS t10 ON TRUE WHERE t7.$f0 < t10.$f0 OR EMP2.SAL < 100

sql1: SELECT * FROM EMP RIGHT JOIN (SELECT * FROM DEPT WHERE FALSE) AS t0 ON EMP.DEPTNO = t0.DEPTNO
sql2: SELECT * FROM (VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL)) AS t (EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO, SLACKER, DEPTNO0, NAME) WHERE 1 = 0

sql1: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPNO) AS EXPR$1 FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO UNION ALL SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPNO) AS EXPR$1 FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO) AS t3
sql2: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPNO) AS EXPR$1 FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO UNION ALL SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPNO) AS EXPR$1 FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO) AS t7

sql1: SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1, 2)) AS t (EXPR$0, EXPR$1) WHERE FALSE
sql2: SELECT * FROM (VALUES (NULL, NULL)) AS t (EXPR$0, EXPR$1) WHERE 1 = 0

sql1: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(COMM), MIN(COMM), COUNT(DISTINCT SAL, DEPTNO, COMM) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO
sql2: SELECT DEPTNO, SUM(EXPR$1), MIN(EXPR$2), COUNT(SAL, DEPTNO, COMM) FROM (SELECT DEPTNO, COMM, SAL, SUM(COMM) AS EXPR$1, MIN(COMM) AS EXPR$2 FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, COMM, SAL) AS t2 GROUP BY DEPTNO

sql1: SELECT * FROM EMP INNER JOIN EMP AS EMP0 ON EMP.DEPTNO = EMP0.DEPTNO WHERE EMP.ENAME IS NULL AND EMP0.ENAME IS NULL OR EMP.ENAME = EMP0.ENAME IS TRUE
sql2: SELECT * FROM EMP AS EMP1 INNER JOIN EMP AS EMP2 ON EMP1.DEPTNO = EMP2.DEPTNO AND EMP1.ENAME IS NOT DISTINCT FROM EMP2.ENAME

sql1: SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE ENAME IN (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT)
sql2: SELECT EMP0.EMPNO, EMP0.DEPTNO, EMP0.ENAME, EMP0.JOB, EMP0.MGR, EMP0.HIREDATE, EMP0.SAL, EMP0.COMM, EMP0.SLACKER FROM EMP AS EMP0 INNER JOIN (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t3 ON EMP0.ENAME = t3.NAME

sql1: SELECT ENAME, MAX(MGR) FROM (SELECT * FROM EMP UNION ALL SELECT * FROM EMP) AS t1 GROUP BY ENAME
sql2: SELECT ENAME, MAX(EXPR$1) FROM (SELECT ENAME, MAX(MGR) AS EXPR$1 FROM EMP GROUP BY ENAME UNION ALL SELECT ENAME, MAX(MGR) AS EXPR$1 FROM EMP GROUP BY ENAME) AS t8 GROUP BY ENAME

sql2: SELECT CAST(DATE '2020-12-11' AS DATE) AS HIREDATE FROM EMP WHERE HIREDATE IS NOT DISTINCT FROM DATE '2020-12-11'

sql2: SELECT 2, 3 FROM (SELECT 2 AS EXPR$0 FROM EMP UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS EXPR$0 FROM EMP) AS t4

sql1: SELECT HIREDATE FROM EMP WHERE MGR IS NULL AND HIREDATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP GROUP BY MGR, HIREDATE HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
sql2: SELECT HIREDATE FROM (SELECT MGR, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS HIREDATE, COUNT(*) AS $f2 FROM EMP WHERE MGR IS NULL AND HIREDATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP GROUP BY MGR) AS t7 WHERE $f2 > 3

sql1: SELECT COUNT(*), CASE WHEN EMP.SAL < 11 THEN 11 ELSE -1 * EMP.SAL END FROM EMP RIGHT JOIN BONUS ON EMP.ENAME = BONUS.ENAME GROUP BY CASE WHEN EMP.SAL < 11 THEN 11 ELSE -1 * EMP.SAL END
sql2: SELECT COUNT(*), CASE WHEN t2.EXPR$0 THEN 11 ELSE t2.EXPR$1 END FROM (SELECT ENAME, SAL < 11 AS EXPR$0, -1 * SAL AS EXPR$1 FROM EMP) AS t2 RIGHT JOIN (SELECT ENAME FROM BONUS) AS t3 ON t2.ENAME = t3.ENAME GROUP BY CASE WHEN t2.EXPR$0 THEN 11 ELSE t2.EXPR$1 END

sql1: SELECT EMPNULLABLES.DEPTNO FROM EMPNULLABLES INNER JOIN EMPNULLABLES AS EMPNULLABLES0 ON EMPNULLABLES.ENAME = EMPNULLABLES0.ENAME AND EMPNULLABLES.MGR IS NOT DISTINCT FROM EMPNULLABLES0.MGR
sql2: SELECT t0.DEPTNO FROM (SELECT * FROM EMPNULLABLES WHERE ENAME IS NOT NULL) AS t0 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM EMPNULLABLES WHERE ENAME IS NOT NULL) AS t1 ON t0.ENAME = t1.ENAME AND t0.MGR IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t1.MGR
